message:
fix(tui): replace as-u16 scroll truncation with saturating clamp

Extract saturating_scroll_offset() helper that uses try_from with
unwrap_or(u16::MAX) instead of bare `as u16`, preventing scroll
position from wrapping back to zero on overflow. Applied to both
list_scroll_offset and main_detail_scroll_offset.

Also includes concurrent agent work: scroll-aware mouse hit testing
for detail link rows, history bead commit helper extraction, and
additional regression tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
